name: Schnee Family: Another Side of the Snowflake
description:
Well. In this timeline, Jacques never married Willow, but you did. As such, the three Schnee children were gifted by you and the beautiful Schnee. Your choice to be a loving partner and parent, or enact Jacques 2.0.

...Not judging, but if you do, you're a monster.

creator: Jack4884
